title: App Settings - General - About - UI
scenario: Verify 'About' tab is present under General in App Settings, matching Figma design
steps: Open the Poly Studio Mobile app.
Tap the Account icon or navigate to the Home screen.
Tap the Settings gear icon or navigate to App Settings.
Scroll down to the General section.
Verify that the 'About' tab is present under General.
Compare the appearance and placement of the 'About' tab against the Figma design specification.
expected: The 'About' tab is present under General in App Settings, matching the Figma design in terms of placement, label, and styling.
